faqs.question: What cockroach species are common in Rockville Centre homes?
faqs.answer: Rockville Centre properties most commonly experience German cockroach and American cockroach infestations. German cockroaches prefer kitchens and bathrooms, while American cockroaches often enter through basements and sewers, particularly in older Long Island homes.
